summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for TechTangle MVP. 20/20 backend pytest tests pass covering auth (register/login/me), levels (4 tiers, 44 puzzles seeded), puzzles (next/submit/no-double-credit/unlock-after-5), leaderboard (sorted, admin excluded), profile (stats+rank), and admin CRUD + RBAC. Frontend E2E flows verified: landing CTAs, student registration -> /dashboard, navigation, puzzle arena (tile clicks, slot fill, submit gating, wrong-answer feedback), tier switch, admin login -> /admin with stats, admin/puzzles modal create (new puzzle persisted and visible in list), leaderboard, profile.
action_items: (Doc-only) Review request referenced 'puzzle-form-submit' data-testid for the admin create-puzzle modal save button, but the actual implementation uses 'puzzle-form-save'. Either update the documentation in the review brief or rename the testid to 'puzzle-form-submit' in /app/frontend/src/pages/AdminPuzzles.jsx (line ~198) for consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: CORS is set with allow_origins=['*'] and allow_credentials=False, which is OK for current Bearer-token auth (no cookies). If httpOnly cookies are introduced later this must be changed to explicit origins.
server.py: PUZZLES_TO_UNLOCK_NEXT=5 and LEVEL_ORDER are hard-coded constants - acceptable for MVP, consider env-driven for tunability.
server.py: serialize_puzzle_public scrambles on each fetch (random order); intentional and good for re-fetches.
server.py uses @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') which is deprecated in newer FastAPI versions - consider lifespan handlers; non-blocking for now.
Frontend AdminPuzzles uses puzzle-form-save (not puzzle-form-submit) - minor naming inconsistency with brief, no functional issue.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the flows tested (landing, register, dashboard, puzzle arena, tier switch, admin login, admin stats, admin puzzle create, leaderboard, profile)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@techtangle.edu / Admin@123 (auto-seeded). Students created on the fly during tests.
seed_data_creation: Tests created several TEST_ prefixed students and one TESTUI<ts> puzzle in admin/puzzles via UI; CRUD tests clean up their own puzzles. Some TEST_ student accounts and the TESTUI puzzle remain in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is the regression suite - run with `python -m pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Admin testid for create-puzzle save button is 'puzzle-form-save' (NOT 'puzzle-form-submit' as the brief stated). Token is stored in localStorage key 'tt_token'; ProtectedRoute and PublicOnlyRoute will redirect logged-in users away from /login,/register and unauthenticated users away from /dashboard,/play,/admin. Frontend hot-reload is on; do not restart unless you change .env.
